Notice Of Hearing And Remote Appearance
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearances in this matter, the court orders this matter off calendar.

PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC's petition for approval for transfer of payment rights is OFF CALENDAR.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

Off Calendar Apr-25-2022 Continued To May-23-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Turan T. Williams, Esq. specially appearing for James Felton, Esq. on behalf of JG Wentworth.
Alicia Jones (415.368.5826) payee (audio only).

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC's Petition for Approval for Transfer of Payment Rights is continued to May 23, 2022 at 9:30am, Dept 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing And Remote Appearance
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Continued To Apr-25-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. GLEN NAVIS, Esq. of G&B Law, LLP (Tel: 818-382-6200) for petitioner J.G. Wentworth Originations, LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF PETITIONER: J.G. WENTWORTH PAYMENT RIGHTS.

Matter discussed. The Court has now received a set of courtesy copies of petitioner's papers from the petitioner. The Court grants a continuance of today's hearing to April 25, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Petitioner to provide notice to all affected parties.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
